DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.
Off Calendar Nov-01-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

Robert Chan, in propria persona, Plaintiff.

Michael Nguyen, Esq., of SEVERSON & WERSON, (949) 442-7110, for Defendant.

No other appearances.

RE: Defendant Bank of America's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Not argued/contested. The court adopts its tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order is signed.

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-01-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

Robert Chan, in propria persona, Plaintiff.

Michael Nguyen, Esq., of SEVERSON & WERSON, (949) 442-7110, for Defendant.

No other appearances.

RE: Defendant Bank of America's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Not argued/contested. The parties discuss the statutory period for leave to file an amended complaint and agree to allow twenty (20) days.

The court adopts its tentative ruling RE: Defendant Bank of America's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order is signed.

DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.
Off Calendar Oct-17-2023 Continued To Nov-01-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Robert Chan, Esq. 415-759-8877 for Plaintiff.
Michael Nguyen, Esq. 949-442-7110 Severson & Werson for Defendant.

Discussed. The Court annnounces there was no tentative for the motion to strike and since both motions are fully briefed, the Court will re-set the motion to 11/1/23 at 9:30am. Both Counsel agree. The Court rules as follows:

2 - DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Both motions are continued to 11/1/23 at 9:30am per the agreement of all parties.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
